name: ha-mk24
description: Custom Home Assistant cards distributed with HACS.

scripts.sync:community: ssh raspi "mkdir -p /homeassistant/www/community/ha-mk24" && scp dist/mk24-hello-card.js raspi:/homeassistant/www/community/ha-mk24/mk24-hello-card.js && ssh raspi "rm -f /homeassistant/www/community/ha-mk24/mk24-hello-card.js.gz /homeassistant/www/community/ha-mk24/mk24-hello-card.js.map"
